'''Gobindi''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Noonian sector/Legends|Noonian sector]], with an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] bioweapons lab. [[Human/Legends|Human]] siblings [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak]] and [[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash Arranda]] visited the planet seeking medical aid after Zak contracted a stomach virus. Zak was taken to the hospital and treated. While Tash and her droid [[DV-9]] went for a walk, they encountered a [[blob]], unaware it was hostile until it lunged at them and almost crushed the droid. This was their first encounter with the blob, one of the experiments in [[Borborygmus Gog]]'s [[Project Starscream]].

The planet was the source of ''[[Influenza necrosi]]''.

{{Planet-stub}}
